productions.title: AI agents coordinating factory maintenance

brief.purpose: Create photoreal human visual assets for AI agents coordinating factory maintenance.
brief.subject: The narrative connects the brief, the audience need, and the strongest research findings into an actionable story arc.
brief.style: Photorealistic, cinematic, realistic human subjects, corporate documentary still.
brief.prompt: Photorealistic documentary photograph of a contemporary corporate enterprise scene. Not an illustration, not a cartoon, not a flat vector graphic, not a 3D stylized render. Show diverse adult Nigerian or West African business professionals with natural dark-brown skin tones, realistic facial features, skin texture, hair, hands, and contemporary corporate clothing. Production context: AI agents coordinating factory maintenance. Scene: Scene 03 · Core narrative. Shot plan: Data Wall Insert. Framing direction: Insert close-up. Camera path: Subtle push-in. Visual focus: The narrative connects the brief, the audience need, and the strongest research findings into an actionable story arc.. The narrative connects the brief, the audience need, and the strongest research findings into an actionable story arc. Use a real camera capture aesthetic, medium-wide composition, readable environment, soft directional lighting, accurate anatomy, no watermark, no text artifacts, no celebrity likeness. Modern Lagos or Nigerian enterprise interiors when supported by the brief; polished cinematic corporate mood.
brief.typography: No text except approved interface labels
brief.originality: Must be original and unique to this storyboard package

hierarchy: The narrative connects the brief, the audience need, and the strongest research findings into an actionable story arc.
localeProfile.environment: The narrative connects the brief, the audience need, and the strongest research findings into an actionable story arc.
localeProfile.demographics: Diverse adult Nigerian professionals with natural West African features, varied skin tones and contemporary professional presentation
localeProfile.clothing: Contemporary Nigerian corporate and technical workwear; business shirts, blazers, smart casual and industrial safety details only where the scene supports them
localeProfile.architecture: Modern Lagos commercial interiors, corporate offices, operations rooms and technology workspaces; no generic foreign office tropes
localeProfile.infrastructure: Locally plausible Nigerian enterprise technology, screens, desks, power/infrastructure context and business environment
localeProfile.climate: Tropical West African lighting and climate context, warm daylight when visible
localeProfile.currency: NGN / naira where currency is visible
localeProfile.signage: No foreign signage; English signage only if supported and legible
culturalNotes: Traditional attire is not the default for corporate Lagos scenes.
Avoid stereotypes, token cultural symbols, caricatures, poverty cues and exaggerated national motifs.
Show credible contemporary Nigerian professionals in a modern business setting.

constraints.typography: No text except approved interface labels
constraints.originality: Must be original and unique to this storyboard package
